builderData.description: HDIL is a diversified real estate developer with a strong presence in the Mumbai Metropolitan Region. With expertise across residential, commercial, retail, and slum rehabilitation projects, we aim to create sustainable spaces that serve both present and future generations. Our commitment lies in delivering quality, customer satisfaction, and impactful urban development through thoughtful design, innovation, and inclusive growth.

ratingsByFeature.title: Ratings by features
ratingsByFeature.info: Overall Rating & parameter wise rating has been calculated taking into account quality, quantity & recency of reviews

tuples.title: Positives
tuples.review: Ratan Nagar is a hidden gem, a place behind the main road, very quiet compared to the noisy Manish Nagar area. Greenery is good here with old trees giving shade for a morning walk, which is rare in Andheri. Schools and tuition classes are many in the Four Bungalows area nearby, so students' travel is less. The market is easily accessible, just 5 mins walk, but the noise does not come here. Plus police patrolling van is taking round in night for safety checks. Connectivity to the DN Nagar metro is also within walking distance. Hospitals are near, so medical help is available quickly in an emergency.

tuples.title: Negatives
tuples.review: Ratan Nagar's internal roads are very narrow; two cars cannot pass at the same time, and scraping is happening. Maintaince of street lights is poor, half the lane is dark at night, which feels unsafe for ladies walking alone. Cleaning is not daily; the sweeper is skipping duty sometimes, and dry leaves are piling up. Beacaue of redevelopment nearby, dust is coming inside the home furniture and keeping the window open is difficult. The water supply is coming very early in the morning 4 AM, which disturbs sleep daily.

tuples.title: Positives
tuples.review: Manish Nagar is very convenient places for shopping lovers because Four Bungalows market is just within walking distance, you get everything here. Connectivity is superb, the metro station of DN Nagar is nearby so going to Ghatkopar or Versova is very fast for office. Schools like St. Louis is close by for kids so they can walk to school easily. Hospitals facility is good with many nursing homes in the lane for quick treatment. Plus police beat chowki is near the market junction so patrolling is visible all day. Road condition is decent tar roads and auto stand is availabilty 24 hours just outside society gate which is helpful.

tuples.title: Negatives
tuples.review: Manish Nagar is a very noisy place because of the market crowd shouting all day; peace is missing here. Parking is big headache here, visitors park on the road, blocking the gate always and fighting with watchman. Maintaince of old buildings is needed urgent, plaster is looking weak and painting is pending. Cleaning is issue in market area, vegetable waste is thrown on road making bad smell in evening. Water logging is happening in the monsoon because drainage is old style here, knee deep water near market.

tuples.title: Positives
tuples.review: Ratan Nagar is a very convenient place for people who use public transport daily for work. Ratan Nagar is situated right next to Four Bungalows, so the metro and bus depot are both is availabilty very close, saving travel money. The society buildings are decent, and the water supply is good compared to other parts here, with less tanker requirement. Plus, there is a good garden nearby for children to play in the evening and sit for the elders. The vegetable market is cheap, and fresh items come daily in the morning, so kitchen expense is managed well.

tuples.title: Negatives
tuples.review: Ratan Nagar buildings are getting old and need urgent repairs because plaster is falling in some parts. Ratan Nagar drainage pipes leak sometimes, causing a bad smell in the compound, is here which causes mosquito breeding. Beacaue it is an old area, there is no lift in some buildings, which makes it hard for senior citizens to climb stairs daily. Plus, during festivals like Ganpati, the loudspeaker noise is too much from the nearby ground till late at night. Maintaince charges are increasing every year, but facilities are not improving fast.

tuples.title: Positives
tuples.review: Manish Nagar is one of the best places for shopping lovers and foodies living in Andheri, with hundreds of shops. Manish Nagar market is very famous, so you get everything from clothes to hardware items just downstairs at very cheap rates. Four Bungalows metro station is hardly 5 minutes walk, which is a blessing for office people travelling to Ghatkopar or Versova daily. Plus, Kokilaben hospital is nearby distance, so medical emergency is handled very fast. It is a very lively area, and you never feel bored even alone beacaue so many people are always roaming.

tuples.title: Negatives
tuples.review: Manish Nagar is an extremely crowded place with no place to park vehicles safely for residents. Manish Nagar lanes are always full of shoppers and bikes, so driving a car is a headache here, and scratches happen daily. The noise of the market continues till late at night, disturbing the sleep of residents living on lower floors. Plus, garbage collection is an issue because so much waste is generated by shops daily, and plastic bags fly everywhere. Cleanliness is not maintaince properly on the back roads where gutters are often open.

tuples.title: Positives
tuples.review: Ratan Nagar is a quiet lane situated right next to the busy market area of Four Bungalows. Ratan Nagar residents can easily reach the metro station and Versova beach for outings and travel. Shop availability is great; you get everything from needles to gold nearby. Plus, safety is very good, the police chowki is close by, and the area is well-lit. The water supply is sufficient, mostly from BMC. Greenery is decent with trees inside compounds.

tuples.title: Negatives
tuples.review: The lanes in Ratan Nagar are very narrow, and driving a big car through them is a test of skill for drivers. Ratan Nagar drainage is often blocked, causing a bad smell in ground-floor houses. Street dog nuisance is increasing, and barking all night disturbs residents' sleep. Plus Maintaince of street lights is slow, some poles are rusted and not working. Construction dust from nearby redevelopment buildings is high. Parking is a daily struggle.

tuples.title: Positives
tuples.review: Manish Nagar is a very prime residential location in Four Bungalows area for families. Manish Nagar is walking distance to Metro station and sports complex, very convenient for lifestyle is here. Market for vegetables and fruits availabilty is famous Four Bungalows market nearby, fresh items daily. Plus safety is excellent, good gentry and educated people living peacefully. Electricity is 24 hours, no power cuts. Parks are well maintained for walking morning and evening.

tuples.title: Negatives
tuples.review: Manish Nagar Road is getting crowded beacaue of metro work and the nearby market rush. Manish Nagar parking space is becoming short as every family has 2 cars now is here. Noise pollution is high during festival season Beacaue of heavy celebration nearby grounds. Plus water shortage is there in summer months, society orders tankers for extra water. Maintaince of footpaths is poor, tiles are broken and uneven for walking.

tuples.title: Positives
tuples.review: Ratan Nagar is a nice place for peaceful living away from chaos. It is having good society culture and festivals like Ganpati is celebrated is here. Plus the Four Bungalows market is connected nearby for all the daily grocery needs. Schools and tuition classes is available for children education. Safety is good and police van is patrolling. Electricity is reliable and meter reading is proper.

tuples.title: Negatives
tuples.review: Ratan Nagar is having a problem with low water pressure in the taps. The pipelines is old so water supply is slow and less is here. Because of this, we have to use suction motor daily. Plus the parking spaces is not enough for the guests vehicles. The road connecting to the Versova is having traffic in evening. Maintaince of the back lanes is not done properly by sweepers.

tuples.title: Positives
tuples.review: Manish Nagar is well planned places with wide roads and big trees. This place has the Four Bungalows market and Metro station just within walking distance. Plus the area is very safe for the senior citizens and families to live. Good schools and parks is available in the connected area. Electricity is 24 hours and street lights is bright. Water supply is sweet and good.

tuples.title: Negatives
tuples.review: Manish Nagar is becoming crowded because of the new redevelopment towers coming up. The vegetable market nearby is creating lot of garbages and smell is here. Because of this, hygiene is affected in the buildings near market. Parking is becoming difficult day by day for visitors. The road connecting to the DN Nagar is having potholes which needs Maintaince.

tuples.title: Positives
tuples.review: Ratan Nagar is very close to the market and the Metro station, making it very easy to travel to work and back. This area is near Four Bungalows and Manish Nagar, and many autos are standing for movement at any time. Because of the prime location, every grocery and daily amenities are within walking distance, plus police patrolling is frequent near the bank for safety. Maintaince of the road is done by the authorities, plus regular cleaning of the market side is done to keep it hygienic for the people living nearby.

tuples.title: Negatives
tuples.review: Ratan Nagar is facing a serious parking shortage and very narrow lanes for cars. Near Four Bungalows, on the market side, the crowd is too much, and getting stuck in traffic for a long time is a daily headache for us. Because there are no parking spaces, people fight every day for space, and the noise pollution from the crowd is too high. Irregular garbage collection makes the road corners very smelly, and drainage is always choked during the monsoon, making the road very dirty and muddy to walk on.

tuples.title: Positives
tuples.review: Manish Nagar is very safe and secure due to its gated locality and frequent police patrols at night. This area is near Four Bungalows and JP Road neighbor area plus streetlights are always working for the safety of ladies and children. Beacaue of safety focus, we can walk safely from the metro station plus many grocery markets and hospitals is within 10 minutes reach.

tuples.title: Negatives
tuples.review: Manish Nagar is facing issues with water supply and frequent power cuts during the monsoon months. Near Four Bungalows side sometimes salty water is coming in the taps plus old drainage system causes water logging in the internal lanes. Because of irregular water, we have to call private tankers plus Maintaince of the pipes is very old and leaking. No parking space is available for visitors plus getting stuck in market traffic is very common and noise pollution from the autos is too much every day.

ContactDetails.address1_label: kamdhenu shopping center lokhandwala complex Andhe

prop_data.Description: The flat is close to metro station, close to hospital and close to market. Property has attached 2 bathrooms with 2 rooms set in 950 sq.Ft. Super built-Up area. The flat is built on 1346 sq.Ft. Area. This property has others as well. Ease of access to 1 covered parking within society. This flat is situated at 10th in a tower with 27 floors. This is a 1-5 years old society. This is an unfurnished flat. Property is ready to be leased on any agreement type from mon, 23 mar 2026 for family only with a notice of 1 month for a duration of 22 months. We are offering this property on  1 lac monthly and is negotiable. The rent is exclusive of charges like  1 monthly maintenance charges. An initial amount of  21000 to be paid to book this property. All residents are required to pay  1 as membership fee to the society.  300000 is required to be paid as the initial payment. Property has been built with latest feature like reserved parking, intercom facility, high ceiling height, false ceiling lighting, piped-Gas, separate entry for servant room, private garden, internet/wi-Fi connectivity, centrally air conditioned, water purifier, recently renovated, corner property, vaastu compliant, natural light, airy rooms and spacious interiors. Swimming pool, fitness centre / gym, club house, park, lift(s), water softening plant, shopping centre and security guard etc. Makes this place stand-Out from rest in terms of quality of living. Other features include rain water harvesting, waste disposal, no open drainage around, bank attached property, low density society, corner property, pet friendly, wheelchair friendly and in a gated society. Power backup: Full. This is a east-Facing property. Property has a marble flooring.
